extracted_claim.claim_summary: The user is claiming damage to their car's body panel.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a red toy car with visible damage, including a broken front section and scratches on its body. It is not a real car.

result.user_claim: Customer: Car body damage claim. | Support: What kind of vehicle is this for? | Customer: My car body panel. | Support: Which part should be reviewed? | Customer: The damaged car body shown in the image.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: No image shows the claimed body; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
result.claim_status_justification: Image evidence is insufficient to evaluate the claim. No image shows the claimed body; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
